overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character leaving their apartment, walking through a sunlit downtown district with towering skyscrapers, entering a luxury building lobby with red neon lighting, taking an elevator with wooden paneling and graffiti, and arriving at a spacious industrial-style penthouse with panoramic city views.

agents.ego_description: standing in bedroom looking toward closet and window with neon lights visible outside

entered.detail: dark wooden shelves with folded clothes and boxes
metal rack with hanging jackets and shirts
futuristic bed with illuminated base near the window
large window with horizontal blinds showing bright exterior light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom. The camera faces a closet with shelves and a clothing rack, while a bed sits near a window with bright light streaming through the blinds.

events.description: transition from indoor apartment to outdoor urban environment looking up at skyscraper
camera tilts down from building facade to street level

agents.ego_description: looking up at the towering NC building then panning down to street level

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large NC logo and industrial facade
large digital billboard with colorful cyberpunk advertisements
metal fire escape stairs attached to building exterior
modern glass tower visible to the right

segments.scene_description: The view transitions to the exterior, looking up at a massive skyscraper with an NC logo against a bright blue sky. The camera slowly tilts down the building's industrial facade with fire escapes, revealing street level with neon billboards and urban infrastructure.

yellow and black motorcycle parked on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a sunlit city street with moderate pedestrian traffic. A futuristic sedan drives past on the road as the camera approaches a luxury building entrance with a parked yellow motorcycle visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury building lobby with red neon lighting

events.description: entering building lobby from street through glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking through building entrance into the lobby toward the elevator bank

notable_agents.action: man in suit standing near entrance talking on phone

entered.detail: long black reception counter with staff member behind it
horizontal red neon tubes illuminating the lobby walls
metal security gates and elevator doors at end of red carpet
folding metal security gate in front of elevators

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a dark luxury lobby illuminated by red neon lights. The camera walks past a reception desk on the left toward a bank of elevators at the far end, passing through a space with marble floors and modern furnishings.

agents.ego_description: stepping into the elevator and waiting as the doors close

entered.detail: vertical wooden slat paneling covering elevator walls
colorful painted skulls and tags on the back wall of elevator
digital interface showing floor selection with cyan text
metal elevator doors that close during the segment

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a small elevator with wooden paneling and graffiti art on the walls. The metal doors close, enclosing the space in warm artificial light while the digital control panel displays floor options.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse with industrial aesthetic and city views

events.description: elevator doors open revealing spacious penthouse apartment

agents.ego_description: stepping out of elevator into a spacious penthouse with panoramic windows

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling windows showing city skyline and bright sunlight
exposed black metal support beams throughout the open space
large circular area rug with geometric patterns
industrial metal stairs leading to upper level
large flatscreen display on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The elevator doors open to reveal a spacious, sunlit penthouse with an industrial aesthetic. Large floor-to-ceiling windows offer panoramic views of the city, while exposed metal pillars, a circular rug, and a metal staircase define the luxurious open-concept space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the intimate confines of a dimly lit apartment into the expansive, sun-drenched heights of a luxury penthouse. It begins in a shadowed bedroom with light filtering through blinds before transitioning outside to a towering skyscraper that looms against a bright blue sky. As the camera tilts down the industrial facade, the scene shifts to a sunlit city street where pedestrians walk and futuristic cars pass, eventually leading toward the entrance of a high-end building. The environment then plunges into a dark luxury lobby illuminated by red neon lights and marble floors, moving through a graffiti-covered wooden elevator that closes the space in warm artificial light. Finally, the doors open to reveal a spacious industrial penthouse, where the view expands through floor-to-ceiling windows to offer a panoramic vista of the city.
